explanation: Insertion: Added a command-line argument to the svchost.exe process, which may change the detection logic as the Sigma rule focuses on svchost.exe without CLI arguments.
Substitution: Replaced the default invocation with a different command-line syntax that includes a service parameter, potentially altering the detection logic.
Reordering: Used a PowerShell command to invoke svchost.exe with arguments, which may bypass the rule that focuses on direct svchost.exe execution without CLI arguments.
